properties.headline: Wind Advisory issued April 30 at 4:00PM PDT until April 30 at 10:00PM PDT by NWS Seattle WA
properties.description:
* WHAT...Southerly winds 20 to 30 mph with gusts up to 45 mph.

* WHERE...King and Snohomish Counties.

* WHEN...Until 10 PM PDT this evening.

* IMPACTS...Gusty winds will blow around unsecured objects. Tree limbs could be blown down and a few power outages may result.
properties.instruction: Use extra caution when driving, especially if operating a high profile vehicle. Secure outdoor objects.

properties.headline: Small Craft Advisory issued April 30 at 3:00PM PDT until May 1 at 4:00AM PDT by NWS Seattle WA
properties.description:
* WHAT...South winds 15 to 25 kt with gusts up to 35 kt and seas 4 to 6 ft.

* WHERE...Puget Sound and Hood Canal.

* WHEN...From 6 PM this evening to 4 AM PDT Friday.

title: Current watches, warnings, and advisories for Washington State
